steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Lines $r$ and $s$ are parallel, and line $t$ is a transversal. Corresponding angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines have equal measures.

steps.title: Match the corresponding angle
steps.content:
The angle marked $x$ corresponds to the angle marked $107^\circ$ in the figure, so
$$x=107$$
The answer is D.
